prompt:
A small brushed 12 V DC motor with a cylindrical metal body lies on a wooden workbench, its shaft pointing toward a hand-crank mechanism or small pulley nearby. Two insulated wires exit the back of the motor, ending in stripped leads ready to be connected. In the background, a simple hand-crank generator assembly and a few gears are softly out of focus, suggesting that this motor is suited for use in small mechanical projects.

Near-future solarpunk workshop aesthetic with warm lighting, a few neatly arranged tools, and a plant or solar gadget on the edge of the frame. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible markings on the motor. The composition should clearly show the motor’s form factor as a standalone inventory item labeled “12 V DC motor.”
